name: Tiingo MCP
description: Python MCP server exposing Tiingo financial data API — real-time and historical stock prices, company fundamentals, and financial news searchable by AI agents.

skills.name: Stock Prices
skills.description: Retrieve real-time and historical stock price data for any US-listed ticker symbol via MCP

skills.name: Company Fundamentals
skills.description: Fetch financial fundamentals including revenue, EPS, P/E ratio, and balance sheet metrics per ticker

skills.name: Financial News
skills.description: Search and retrieve financial news articles filtered by ticker, date range, and keyword query
